description: Implement structured JSON logging, RFC 7807 standardized error responses, request ID tracing, Prometheus metrics, graceful model degradation, and secrets rotation procedures.
oracle_notes: Current server uses plain logging with string formatting, HTTPException with ad-hoc messages, no request tracing, and no metrics. The embedding model is a single point of failure — if it fails to load, the entire API goes down with no degraded mode. Track 19 covers OTel/profiling but not structured logging or error standards.
